site.title: Story Psychology Machine
site.description: An interactive thought-tool for story psychology, curiosity gaps, and trust-building hooks.

hero.headline: Strong stories keep attention by design, not by accident.
hero.subhead: A concept-led lab for testing cliffhangers, curiosity gaps, and trust signals in short-form writing.

premise.headline: Why this exists
paragraphs: Most posts lose readers in the first two lines because the tension is vague or overhyped.
Good story psychology balances curiosity with clarity: enough open loop to continue, enough context to trust.
This machine helps you test language so your hooks feel compelling, useful, and believable.

items.title: Specific setup
items.body: Ground the reader in a scene, stake, or moment before opening the loop.

items.title: Credible tension
items.body: Raise a meaningful question without slipping into empty drama.

items.title: Clear promise
items.body: Signal what kind of payoff the reader will get if they continue.

items.title: Useful reveal
items.body: Close loops with insight readers can apply, not just surprising details.

items.title: Human tone
items.body: Sound like a thoughtful guide, not a sensational headline factory.

closing.headline: Attention is earned with precision.
closing.body: Open loops create momentum; clear payoffs create trust. You need both.
